## Runtime.Session.EditingSession.scaleToTargetWeight() method

Scales the filling to achieve a target weight. Weight-contributing ingredients (g, mL) are scaled proportionally. Non-weight ingredients (tsp, Tbsp, pinch, etc.) remain unchanged.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleToTargetWeight(targetWeight: Measurement): Result<Measurement>;
```

</td><td>

</tbody></table>

Result&lt;[Measurement](./ts-chocolate.measurement.md)<!-- -->&gt;
